raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The CalSavers Retirement Savings Program is designed for private sector workers whose employers do not offer a retirement savings program.",
    "CalSavers is an automatic enrollment individual retirement account (IRA) available to employees without employer fees or fiduciary liability.",
    "SB 1126 would reduce complexity for employers and expand access to CalSavers to small businesses with one to four employees.",
    "Expanding access to CalSavers through SB 1126 would improve employee recruitment and retention across California.",
    "It is estimated that SB 1126 would expand access to CalSavers to approximately three quarters of a million California workers.",
    "CalSavers was created to provide a retirement savings program for employees not offered one by their employer.",
    "CalSavers is required by statute to be self-sustaining based on participant fees."
  ]
}
```
